svg.text: Session 06 — Incident Analysis in a Threat-Centric SOC
IOC = Indicator of Compromise (file hash, IP, domain)
Chain of Custody = Evidence integrity trail from collection to presentation
Volatile Evidence = Lost on power-off (RAM, processes, connections)
Dwell Time = Days between compromise and detection
Security Operations Master Class — Session 06: Incident Analysis in a Threat-Centric SOC
